allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial implementation of CliquePix v1

Full-stack private event-based photo sharing app:

Backend \(Azure Functions v4 TypeScript\):
- 22 HTTP endpoints + 3 timer functions
- Auth with Entra External ID JWT validation via JWKS
- Circles CRUD with invite codes and deep linking
- Events with 24h/3d/7d retention presets
- Photo upload pipeline with User Delegation SAS
- Server-side image validation \(sharp\) and thumbnail generation
- Reactions, notifications, push token management
- Timer-based cleanup for expired photos and orphaned uploads
- PostgreSQL database schema \(8 tables\)

Flutter mobile app \(Dart\):
- Riverpod state management, GoRouter navigation
- 5-layer Entra token refresh defense system
- Dio HTTP client with auth/error/retry interceptors
- Image compression pipeline \(EXIF strip, 2048px, JPEG q80\)
- Direct blob upload via SAS URLs
- Event feed with cached thumbnails and Hero animations
- Optimistic UI for reactions
- Push notification support via FCM
- Deep linking for circle invites \(clique-pix.com\)
- Platform configs for iOS and Android

Infrastructure:
- Well-known files for Universal Links and App Links
- Design system with aqua-blue-violet gradient theme
- Deployment status tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az role assignment create --assignee "0929f2c6-659a-439c-85ea-92e050d2f763" --role "Storage Blob Data Contributor" --scope "/subscriptions/25410e67-b3c8-49a2-8cf0-ab9f77ce613f/resourceGroups/rg-cliquepix-prod/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/stcliquepixprod" 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az role assignment list --assignee "0929f2c6-659a-439c-85ea-92e050d2f763" --all --query "[].{Role:roleDefinitionName, Scope:scope}" -o table 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az postgres flexible-server execute --name pg-cliquepixdb --resource-group rg-cliquepix-prod --admin-user pgadmin --admin-password "Wdis1107*" --database-name cliquepix --file-path "backend/src/shared/db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az postgres flexible-server execute --name pg-cliquepixdb --admin-user pgadmin --admin-password "Wdis1107*" --database-name cliquepix --file-path "backend/src/shared/db/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az postgres flexible-server execute --name pg-cliquepixdb --admin-user pgadmin --admin-password "Wdis1107*" --database-name cliquepix --querytext "SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' ORDER BY table_name;" 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az afd route list --resource-group rg-cliquepix-prod --profile-name fd-cliquepix-prod --endpoint-name cliquepix-api -o json --query "[].{name:name, originGroup:originGroup.id, patternsToMatch:patternsToMatch, linkToDefaultDomain:linkToDefaultDomain, supportedProtocols:supportedProtocols, deploymentStatus:deploymentStatus}")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az afd route update --resource-group rg-cliquepix-prod --profile-name fd-cliquepix-prod --endpoint-name cliquepix-api --route-name default-route --custom-domains api-clique-pix 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az functionapp config appsettings set --resource-group rg-cliquepix-prod --name func-cliquepix-fresh --settings "ENTRA_TENANT_ID=27748e01-d49f-4f0b-b78f-b97c16be69dc" "ENTRA_CLIENT_ID=7db01206-135b-4a34-a4d5-2622d1a888bf" --query "[?name=='ENTRA_TENANT_ID' || name=='ENTRA_CLIENT_ID'].{Name:name, Value:value}" -o table 2>&1)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az staticwebapp deploy --name swa-cliquepix-prod --resource-group rg-cliquepix-prod --source website-deploy.zip)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az apim api operation list \\
  --resource-group rg-cliquepix-prod \\
  --service-name apim-cliquepix-002 \\
  --api-id cliquepix-v1 \\
  -o table 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az apim api operation create \\
  --resource-group rg-cliquepix-prod \\
  --service-name apim-cliquepix-002 \\
  --api-id cliquepix-v1 \\
  --operation-id upload-url \\
  --display-name "Get Upload URL" \\
  --method POST \\
  --url-template "/events/{eventId}/photos/upload-url" \\
  -o json 2>&1)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 az rest --method PUT --uri "https://management.azure.com/subscriptions/25410e67-b3c8-49a2-8cf0-ab9f77ce613f/resourceGroups/rg-cliquepix-prod/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/apim-cliquepix-002/apis/cliquepix-v1/operations/upload-url?api-version=2022-08-01" --headers "Content-Type=application/json" --body '{""properties"":{""displayName"":""Get Upload URL"",""method"":""POST"",""urlTemplate"":""/events/{eventId}/photos/upload-url"",""templateParameters"":[{""name"":""eventId"",""type"":""string"",""required"":true}]}}' --output-file apim-op-upload.json)

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\(''.flutter-plugins-dependencies''\)\); [print\(k,'':'',v.get\(''android'',{}\).get\(''supportsEmbeddingV1'',''N/A''\) if isinstance\(v,dict\) else ''''\) for p in d.get\(''plugins'',{}\).get\(''android'',[]\) for k,v in [\(''name: ''+p.get\(''name'',''?''\), p\)]]")

Bash(powershell -Command "az postgres flexible-server firewall-rule create --resource-group rg-cliquepix-prod --name pg-cliquepixdb --rule-name AllowDevMachine --start-ip-address 38.125.100.43 --end-ip-address 38.125.100.43" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD='your_password' psql -h pg-cliquepixdb.postgres.database.azure.com -U cliquepixadmin -d cliquepix -c "SELECT conname, consrc FROM pg_constraint WHERE conname = 'notifications_type_check';")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm -v "$\(pwd\):/output" --entrypoint ffmpeg jrottenberg/ffmpeg:6-alpine -f lavfi -i "testsrc=duration=5:size=1920x1080:rate=30" -f lavfi -i "sine=frequency=440:duration=5" -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -c:a aac -shortest -y /output/integration-test.mp4)
